Default Judgment Prove-Up Notice
Off Calendar Oct-18-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Laura Martinez,
CSR#11332.

Robert F. Cohen, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff Elavon, Inc.,
Order Granting Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up,
on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendants Lumi Worldwide Inc. dba Lumi Suites; Catherine Zhang; Jake Nelson,
Default of Defendants has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against
Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages: $118,029.42
Pre-Judgment Interest: $8,925.84
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $728.80
Total Judgment in the amount of $127,684.06

Judgment signed in open court.
